toast.localStorageFull: Local storage is full — recent state may not persist.
toast.refLimitExceeded: References are capped at 5. Extra images were dropped.
toast.refTooLarge: Image is too large. Convert to JPEG/PNG or lower the resolution and try again.
toast.refNotBase64: Image file is corrupted or uses an unsupported encoding.
toast.refEmpty: Empty image file. Please pick a different file.
toast.refHeicUnsupported: HEIC/HEIF is not supported. Convert to JPEG or PNG and try again.
toast.noCurrentImageForRef: No current image to use as reference.
toast.addedCurrentAsRef: Added current image as a reference.
toast.sessionReloadedElsewhere: Graph version changed, so the latest graph was reloaded.
toast.openGeneratedDirFailed: Could not open the image folder. Run ima2 doctor to check the storage path.
toast.forkStarted: Prompt imported. Edit and generate again.

size.title: Size
size.hint: Each side 1024–3824, multiple of 16, ratio up to 3:1

sizeConfirm.title: Size adjustment required
sizeConfirm.body: The requested size is outside the image generation limits.
sizeConfirm.reasonPixels: The maximum pixel limit is exceeded.
sizeConfirm.reasonMin: The size is below the minimum.
sizeConfirm.reasonMax: The size is above the maximum.
sizeConfirm.reasonSnap: The size must align to 16px increments.

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.explain: Auto uses the standard safety filter. Low relaxes limits so borderline prompts may pass through.

prompt.label: Prompt
prompt.placeholder: Describe the image you want. Drag & drop or paste to attach reference images...
prompt.placeholderWithRefs: Describe what to do with the attached images...
prompt.useCurrentTitle: Use current result as a reference
prompt.dropHere: Drop to attach as reference (up to {max})

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.searchDisabledPlaceholder: Search is disabled in session view
gallery.emptyAll: No images yet. Create one first.
gallery.storageNoticeRecoverable: Sorry for the scare. Recent versions moved the gallery folder from the installed package to your user data folder. Your old images may still be in the previous generated folder. Run ima2 doctor or open the recovery guide.
gallery.storageNoticeNotFound: Sorry for the scare. We could not find a previous generated folder on this machine. If the old global install folder was replaced during update, automatic recovery may not be possible. Run ima2 doctor and check the recovery guide for manual search steps.
gallery.storageNoticeUnknown: Storage status could not be checked. If the gallery looks empty after an update, run ima2 doctor to inspect the image folder.

node.duplicateBranchTitle: Duplicate as a new branch root
node.nodeRefsUnsupportedForEdit: Extra references are only supported on root nodes for now.
node.classicRefsParkedBody: These images belong to the classic composer and are inactive in node mode.

provider.oauthNotReady: OAuth proxy is not ready yet.
provider.codexLoginHint: Run `codex login` in your terminal, then refresh this page.
provider.oauthStarting: OAuth proxy is starting. Try again in a few seconds.
provider.serverUnreachable: Cannot reach the server. Make sure the backend is running.
provider.apiInvalid: API key is missing or invalid. Check OPENAI_API_KEY in the server's .env.

result.continueHereTitle: Import this image's prompt and keep working

session.deleteConfirm: Delete session "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
session.assetAbortedError: Generation did not finish cleanly. Retry from this node.

sidebar.nodeModeHint: In node mode, click a node to edit its prompt and generate. Settings on the right panel (quality/size) apply to every new result.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, display, and future workspace controls live here so the generator stays focused.

account.oauthBody: Generation currently runs through your Codex OAuth session. API-key generation remains disabled in this build.
account.apiBody: ima2-gen found an API key in env/config, but the app is OAuth-only right now. Remove the key only if you do not want this status shown.

imageModel.title: Image model
imageModel.body: Choose the OAuth model used for future image generations.
imageModel.gpt53CodexSpark: GPT-5.3 Codex Spark — unsupported for images
imageModel.unsupportedHelp: Default is GPT-5.4 Mini. GPT-5.3 Codex Spark may appear in OAuth model status, but it does not support the image_generation tool.

appearance.themeBody: Choose how the workspace should look on this device.

language.title: Language
language.body: Switch the UI language without changing generated content.

future.title: Reserved for later
future.body: Future provider repair and workspace controls will appear here when they become useful.

nodeCanvas.hint: Drag a handle into empty space to branch. Press Delete or Backspace to remove.

styleSheet.emptyHint: No style sheet yet. Extract from the current prompt to lock in a look.
styleSheet.errNoKey: Style-sheet extraction needs an OpenAI API key. Connect one via setup.
styleSheet.errBadOutput: Model returned an unusable sheet — try a more specific prompt.
styleSheet.placeholderSubject: e.g. young woman in red jacket

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.body: Please try again shortly. If it persists, copy the raw error message below and report it.

moderationRefused.title: Prompt blocked by moderation
moderationRefused.body: Soften the wording or rephrase. Sensitive/violent content in reference images can also trigger this.

upstream5xx.title: OpenAI is currently busy
upstream5xx.body: Retrying usually resolves this. Check status.openai.com if it persists.

authChatgptExpired.title: Codex ChatGPT session expired
authChatgptExpired.body: Run `npx @openai/codex login` in your terminal, then reload this app.

authApiKeyInvalid.title: API key authentication failed
authApiKeyInvalid.body: The key is invalid, revoked, out of quota, or tied to the wrong org. This app runs in OAuth mode, so switch to ChatGPT login.

networkFailed.title: Network connection failed
networkFailed.body: Could not reach OpenAI or the local OAuth proxy. Check VPN/firewall and status.openai.com.

oauthUnavailable.title: OAuth proxy unavailable
oauthUnavailable.body: The local OAuth proxy is not running. Restart `ima2 serve` and try again.

apikeyDisabled.title: API-key mode is disabled
apikeyDisabled.body: This app is OAuth-only (ChatGPT login). Switch the provider to OAuth.
